---
title: "Research projects"
---

## Current projects

### Financial protection in Mexico

This project examines the evolution of catastrophic health expenditure, out-of-pocket spending, and effective access to health care in Mexico’s fragmented health system.

### Social protection in health

This line of work analyses how health insurance arrangements, public financing, and provider availability shape protection against financial hardship.

### Small-area estimation and forecasting

This project applies small-area estimation and forecasting methods to analyse municipal-level variation in financial protection, effective coverage, and labour precariousness.
---
